description_long: This is a tall, trapezoidal wooden bookcase with six evenly spaced horizontal shelves, including the base, providing ample storage for books or other items. The bookcase is constructed from a dark brown wood with a visible grain texture, giving it a sturdy and robust appearance. The sides and back are solid panels, while the front is completely open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and no decorative elements or hardware. The finish appears matte, contributing to a rustic or utilitarian aesthetic. This piece would be suitable for placement in urban environments such as offices, libraries, or residential interiors.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden bookcase with six open shelves and a simple, sturdy design. The finish is matte, and the style is functional and rustic.
description_view_0: Front view showing six open shelves and the full storage capacity of the bookcase.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat wooden panel and the depth of the bookcase.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid wooden back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and depth.
